title: calceolaria microbefaria subsp. fruticosa
intro: Calceolaria microbefaria subsp. fruticosa, also known as the "Pocket Flower," is a flowering plant species belonging to the Calceolaria genus, characterized by its unique, pouch-like flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calceolaria microbefaria subsp. fruticosa include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
